title: Fröken Vildkatt
writer: Weyler Hildebrand, Armand Szántó, Mihály Szécsén
actors: Marguerite Viby, Åke Söderblom, Stig Järrel
plot: Thomas Palm has recently been promoted at his work at The Royal Canal Office. He celebrates with his friends on a night out and on the way home he saves a woman from drowning.
